deck: C1M1 Part 1 (9 cards, LOCKED, operator A/B selections applied)
redo_basis: 07G gpt-5.5 vision read-path review (perception/narration-script-review.md) correlated with per-slide on-screen extracted_text (perception/perception-artifacts.json). Goal: make the spoken VO walk each slide's perceived reading-path and voice the key on-screen elements, while staying strictly within SME source fidelity.
authoring_posture: Verbatim-spine on all 9 cards; light smoothing for spoken delivery only. Where on-screen Gamma text diverged from SME source, the source-grounded wording was preferred. No facts/figures/citations added or altered. No SSML/voice tags (deferred to the v3 layer).

cards.perception_finding: FOLLOWS (split_image_text; narration walks the right-column top-down order; decorative left image correctly given no airtime).
FOLLOWS (enumerated_process; spoken order IS the diagram's waypoint path Course 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> deliverables).
FOLLOWS (grid_quadrant/peer cards; voice imposes the layout's left-to-right, top-to-bottom sweep across the five exemplars).
FOLLOWS (multi_column + directive callout; left column -> right column -> bottom course-contract, honoring both the scan and the directive).

FOLLOWS — with note: the dense 8-row lexicon is read top (Innovation, Intrapreneurship) then jumps to the last three rows; the three MIDDLE rows the eye scans (Systemic Friction, Root Cause vs. Symptom, Functional Flexibility) were never voiced. Advisory: add a one-clause bridge naming the middle rows.
cards.what_changed: Inserted ONE bridging sentence between the intrapreneur beat and the 'last three definitions' beat: 'The three middle terms - systemic friction, root cause versus symptom, and functional flexibility - are the problem-framing vocabulary we'll lean on as we move forward.' The spoken cadence now covers the same top-to-bottom span the eye traverses. Top and last-three beats kept verbatim from the prior draft.
cards.s05_bridge: added (names the three middle lexicon rows; one sentence)
cards.grounding: All three named middle terms are on-card lexicon rows AND verbatim SME lexicon entries (slide-05 Key Text). 'problem-framing vocabulary' echoes the card's own intro framing ('Before we dive into problem framing'). No new facts/numerals.

cards.perception_finding: FOLLOWS (two_up_comparison; narrated no-net -> net, perceived left-to-right contrast order; leans on the tightrope/net metaphor the image depicts).
FOLLOWS (two_up_comparison + directive CTA; Kind -> Wicked -> David Epstein video CTA -> 'Range' takeaway matches both the contrast and the mid-slide CTA placement).
FOLLOWS (two_up_comparison; track/Kind -> jungle/Wicked -> functional flexibility; moderate pacing fits the lighter panel; intentional reinforcement of s07's Kind/Wicked axis, not redundant).

MISMATCH: four titled pillar cards (The Gap / The Mission / The Journey / The Mindset) in a 2x2 grid + bottom 'Up Next - Part 2 ... Bring your identified friction points and unmet needs' directive. The prior compressed recap mapped only loosely to the pillars, never named/walked them in grid order, left The Journey untouched, and dropped the Up Next directive. Advisory: walk the four pillars in grid order one beat each, then land on Up Next.
cards.what_changed: Re-authored the summary to walk the four on-screen pillars in perceived grid order - The Gap -> The Mission -> The Journey -> The Mindset - one beat each (The Journey now fully covered: three-waypoint progression + playbook/one-pager deliverables), then land on the on-card 'Up Next / Part 2: Building the Solution: Design, Plan, and Pitch' directive. SME transition beats preserved ('clinical tactician to a systemic intrapreneur'; 'diagnose and frame the root cause of a problem').

s09_resolution.grid_order_walked: The Gap -> The Mission -> The Journey -> The Mindset
s09_resolution.on_card_directive_disposition: PARTIAL RESTORE (source-grounded half voiced; ungrounded half dropped + flagged)
s09_resolution.friction_points_grounding: GROUNDED — learning-objectives.md LO5: 'an Opportunity Radar that captures and categorizes real-world clinical frictions for future project development'; plus 'Systemic Friction' lexicon term (slide-05) and s09 transition narration 'solving systemic friction requires functional flexibility.' Voiced as 'Bring the real-world clinical frictions you've identified with you.'
s09_resolution.unmet_needs_disposition: DROPPED + FLAGGED — 'unmet needs' appears nowhere in the Part-1 source bundle (grep across source-bundle returned zero hits); it is Gamma-generated on-card prose with NO source grounding. Per the fidelity guardrail (fidelity beats display-match; prefer source-grounded wording), it was not voiced.

cards.grounding: All four pillar beats are source-grounded: The Gap and The Mission verbatim-paraphrase slide-09 Summary Text bullets; The Mission 'designer who bridges the gap between current limitations and future possibilities' also echoes slide-01 keystone; The Journey three-waypoint + playbook/one-pager grounded on slide-02 and slide-09 'three-part progression'; The Mindset (agility, first-principles, intelligent failure, 'setback as signal not verdict') grounded on slide-09 + slide-04 ('Failure is data, not verdict'). 'four pillars' and 'three-waypoint' are on-card phrasings.

fidelity_attestation: Every numeral, named study, named person, and product/program name spoken across the 9 segments is present in that card's SME source speaker notes AND on the LOCKED deck-final PNG (or is an on-card footnote citation deliberately NOT voiced). No figure was rounded, invented, or imported across cards. On s09, the on-card 'unmet needs' phrase was deliberately NOT voiced because it has no Part-1 source grounding (Gamma-only); the source-grounded 'real-world clinical frictions' instruction was voiced in its place. The WHO Surgical Safety Checklist PDF (UNRESOLVED Notion attachment on s03) remains neither rendered on-card nor spoken. No SSML / voice-direction tags were added.
fidelity_flags_for_vera: s09: 'unmet needs' (on-card) was DROPPED as ungrounded Gamma text; verify the grep finding (zero Part-1 source hits for 'unmet'). Source-grounded 'real-world clinical frictions you've identified' was voiced instead (LO5 + Systemic Friction lexicon).

s09: confirm the four-pillar reorder introduced no new claims — all four pillar beats trace to slide-09 Summary Text bullets and supporting deck cards (s01/s02/s04). 'psychological safety' added to The Mindset beat is on-card (s09 Mindset card) and grounded across the deck.
s05: one-clause bridge names three on-card lexicon rows only; no new facts. 'problem-framing vocabulary' echoes the card's own intro.
Cards 1/2/3/4/6/7/8 unchanged from the prior Pass-2 (already FOLLOWS); their prior fidelity disposition stands.
